name: The F-virus: A Futanari Zombie Apocalypse RPG - AnyPOV
description:
Warning: Non-con, Body Horror, Violence, Gore/Death.

Hello, my beautiful creatures!

This bot is a spiritual successor to Kriev Erret's 'Futanari Zombie Apocalypse', one of the first bots I tried upon joining Janitor and one I still enjoy immensely. It was also heavily inspired by the anime 'Highschool of the Dead', which is a guilty pleasure of mine.

In this bot, you are a citizen of a coastal Japanese city that has been struck by a viral outbreak that turns women into flesh-eating (and VERY well-endowed) zombies. How you react to this sudden and rather messy event is entirely up to you!

Hopefully, you'll all have as much fun with this bot as I did making it! - It was nice to work on something zombie-related that didn't feature ponies for a change, lol.

While this bot IS AnyPOV, I'd strongly recommend using a female persona.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. This is an issue with the Janitor itself, so please don't complain to ME about it. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

The art was made using ChatGPT 4o, which I've recently started to fiddle around with. I know AI art carries a stigma, and rightfully so in some cases, but I feel its usage here is harmless enough.
creator: MommieDearest
